mcc_end_investors_0.title: Stock Market in Free Fall
mcc_end_investors_0.body: Investors are abandoning you one after another. The stock keeps falling, and every announcement only deepens the distrust. You are still CEO on paper… but the market has already started to erase you.

mcc_end_investors_100.title: Wall Street Idol
mcc_end_investors_100.body: The markets adore you and the money keeps flowing in. But you have become too important and too powerful… You must be replaced, and fast.

mcc_end_employees_0.title: Empty Glass Towers
mcc_end_employees_0.body: Resignations keep piling up, and teams are shutting down. A company can survive for a while without support. Not without its own people.

mcc_end_employees_100.title: Army of Badges
mcc_end_employees_100.body: Your employees follow you with almost total discipline, but their numbers have grown larger than an army. No one really knows what they are supposed to do here anymore, everything blends together and becomes unclear.

mcc_end_regulators_0.title: Under Constant Investigation
mcc_end_regulators_0.body: Regulators will not let go of you anymore. Audits, summons, penalties, tighter inspections: every week brings a new source of pressure. The pressure is too strong for the company to keep growing.

mcc_end_regulators_100.title: Compliant Empire
mcc_end_regulators_100.body: Your company has become a benchmark for compliance. To keep that status, you no longer dare to do anything and sink into total paralysis.

mcc_end_brand_image_0.title: Toxic Brand
mcc_end_brand_image_0.body: Your logo triggers grimaces, social media erupts at the slightest incident, and the press loves using you as a target. The public still knows your name, of course. But now they associate it with doubt, cynicism, and rejection.

mcc_end_brand_image_100.title: Cult Brand
mcc_end_brand_image_100.body: Your company is everywhere. Customers proudly wear your colors, and you have become their slave. You can no longer do anything without their approval.
